name: patterns-index
description: Reusable MicroPython code patterns. Each pattern is a self-contained recipe with full code, why-it-works explanation, and common variants. Copy-paste ready.

wifi-reconnect.description: WiFi auto-reconnect with watchdog awareness and non-blocking status check

nonblocking-loop.description: Timer-based non-blocking main loop — replace time.sleep() with ticks_ms()

config-nvs.description: Persist settings (WiFi credentials, device params) in NVS flash (PLANNED)

deep-sleep.description: Battery-friendly deep sleep with RTC memory and wake sources (PLANNED)

sensor-read.description: Robust sensor reading with timeout, retry, and graceful degradation

ota-update.description: OTA firmware update from HTTP server (PLANNED)
